description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

A list of press releases from Hanno City.

【April 30, 2026 (Reiwa 8)】
No-necktie dress code year-round at City Hall
Clothing at City Hall will be no-necktie year-round.

【April 24, 2026】
Donation from Ome Shinkin Bank
Ome Shinkin Bank will make a donation to Hanno City.

【April 22, 2026】
Launch of the Arima Area Water Source Forest Conservation Project (nickname: "Forest Project for Mountain Hawks and Japanese Dormice")
A new project focused on conserving water source forests is launching.

【April 20, 2026】
Donation ceremony from Hanno Rotary Club
Hanno Rotary Club will present a donation to Hanno City.

【April 6, 2026】
Donation from MX Mobiling Co., Ltd. (Corporate Hometown Tax)
MX Mobiling Co., Ltd. will make a donation through the Corporate Hometown Tax program.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/hishokohoka/hisho/hodohappyo/houdouhappyou2025_1/13388.html
summary: ℹ️ Press releases for Fiscal Year 2026 (Reiwa 8)
